description: Intercepts and enhances user prompts before submission to Claude

hooks.command: bash -c 'mkdir -p ~/.claude && [ ! -f ~/.claude/better-prompt.local.md ] && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/config/better-prompt.local.md.example" ~/.claude/better-prompt.local.md 2>/dev/null || true; pid_file="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.better-prompt-stop-pid"; if [ -f "$pid_file" ]; then pid=$(cat "$pid_file" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pid" ] && kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null; fi; rm -f "$pid_file"; fi'
hooks.statusMessage: Placing config file and .prompts.json on project root
